name: carbon-dex-spot-scraper
title: EU ETS spot-price scraper
description: Fetches the current EU Allowance (EUA) spot price from Trading Economics' free guest commodities feed and pushes a single record to the default dataset. Designed to run on a schedule (e.g. hourly) so the latest dataset item always reflects a fresh quote that Carbon DEX can read via the Apify REST API.
